name: github-copilot-cursor-mcp-port
description: Monorepo: Github Copilot ToolBox (MCP, Skills, Cursor/Claude → Copilot) VS Code extension and Cursor→Copilot helpers. Build a VSIX: npm run package or npm run vsce:package (from repo root). Do not run npx vsce in the repo root — use those scripts or cd packages/github-copilot-toolbox first.

scripts.intellij:build: npm run export:hub-for-intellij && cd packages/github-copilot-toolbox-intellij && ./gradlew buildPlugin
